name: harness-check
description: Run harness gate checks before/after branch, merge, and feature transitions. Enforces that all gates pass before the next feature can start. Use when: starting a new feature, before merge, after merge, before next feature, or running a retro. Triggers on: 'harness check', 'gate check', 'check gates', 'run gates', 'pre-work check', 'pre-merge check', 'next-ready', 'retro gate'.
compatibility: OpenCode with bash + git + go. Optional: gh CLI, openspec CLI, golangci-lint.
